sections.title: At random or when a nearby Beef pet uses moo
Upon seeing someone teleport to the Lumbridge cow field with the cowbell amulet
Using Nuff's certificate on the cow

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what these strange marks mean?

lines.speaker: Cow
lines.text: Can't the human take a hint? I've been ignoring you! Do you think I would ignore you if I wanted to discuss your Rorschach ink-blots ?

lines.speaker: Cow
lines.text: Hmm, interesting, there appears to be a human trying to talk to me. Is it aware that cows can't talk I wonder? Maybe if I just ignore it, it might go away.
